name: Rust
description: Rust toolchain via rustup, with RUSTUP_HOME / CARGO_HOME pinned system-wide so the toolchain is shared across container users.

version.description: Rust toolchain. 'stable', 'nightly', 'beta', or a specific version like '1.83'.

targets.description: Space-separated rustup targets to add (e.g. 'wasm32-unknown-unknown x86_64-unknown-linux-musl').
